changes.value:
`mirdan/src/doctor.rs:228`

The fix suggestion for a missing agent config says:
```
"Check ~/.mirdan/agents.yaml for syntax errors"
```
and the credentials check says:
```
"~/.mirdan/credentials"
```

Neither path has been updated to its XDG equivalent. If users follow these instructions they will look in the wrong place.

Suggestion: Update these strings to reference the XDG paths, e.g.:
- `"Check $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mirdan/agents.yaml (defaults to ~/.config/mirdan/agents.yaml) for syntax errors"`
- `"$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mirdan/credentials"`
nit: mirdan/src/doctor.rs check_credentials still refers to ~/.mirdan/credentials in fix text
